rationale: Faithful AS-IS implementation of frozen v12 Task 4a with no reinterpretation and no scope expansion into 4b/5. inventory.mjs commits sorted PACKAGE_ROOTS, DOC_ROOTS + DOC_WEAVER_EXCLUDE/GLOBAL_EXCLUDE, CONTRACT_FILES (D31), five weaver ids with integer versions, REQUIRED_INVENTORY_IDS exactly equal to the normative table (unit-proven in test-inventory), LOADER_CAPABLE_BUILTIN_SAFE_EXPORTS deep-frozen with exact keys/values and mutation units (D32), and WEAVER_IMPL_FILES only for git+code (D17/AM-17) naming only existing files. util.mjs exports the single shared D33 classifier+resolver (AM-34 test 19 proves sole definition and dual consumption by deriveAcceptedClosure and code.mjs), comment/string-aware lexer, Phase-1 export scanner, real-file walker (escape/symlink reject), D26/D29 counted-iterator (count on completed consumption; accounting only via driver-held accessor), D21 physical-containment (lstat every component, never follow), and no-shell git allowlist for the exact subcommand/arg shapes. test-closure derives closures with the shared classifier/resolver and proves committed inventories equal derived closures, covering every accepted form via form-only fixtures plus recursion/cycles/unreachable-literal/merkle-dag and all fatal/no-edge modes. git.mjs uses exactly the two path-scoped log shapes, first result, git:<sha>, malformed fatal, no-result warns. code.mjs emits all four depends-on endpoint shapes with symbol/file threading, unrepresentable-consumer only for unresolvable, unused no edge, dedup. Zero runtime deps, ESM, node:/clotho-relative only; gate finalStatus meets; orchestrator/atomic-publication/D34/test-doc-ledger weavers correctly deferred.
